tasks.subject: Task 1: Create snapshot backup branch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** archive/dead-services-2026-06-10 exists at current features/poc HEAD with all 35 workflow files reachable.

**Files:** none modified (branch ref only).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Working tree clean apart from known untracked noise; branch is features/poc
- archive/dead-services-2026-06-10 points at same SHA as features/poc
- git ls-tree of branch shows 35 files under .github/workflows/

**Verify:** git rev-parse archive/dead-services-2026-06-10 features/poc -> identical SHAs; git ls-tree --name-only archive/dead-services-2026-06-10 -- .github/workflows/ | wc -l -> 35

**Steps:** preconditions check (branch + clean status) -> git branch archive/dead-services-2026-06-10 -> verify SHAs + file count. STOP if branch already exists or tree dirty. Full commands in plan doc Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "git rev-parse archive/dead-services-2026-06-10 features/poc && git ls-tree --name-only archive/dead-services-2026-06-10 -- .github/workflows/ | wc -l", "acceptanceCriteria": ["branch points at features/poc HEAD", "35 workflow files reachable from branch", "no working-tree changes made"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Delete 28 dead workflows, commit, verify
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Single commit on features/poc removing exactly the 28 dead workflow files; 7 files remain in .github/workflows/.

**Files:** delete 28 under .github/workflows/ (9x cd_build_push_services_*, 9x ci_services_*, 9x service-*-pipeline.yml, + test-embedding-service.yaml — exact list in plan doc Task 2). Keep 7: cd_build_push_api_catalog.yml, ci_services_api_catalog.yml, ci_account_service_backend.yml, ci_account_service_frontend.yml, ci_services_crawler.yml, graphify-auto-rebuild.yml, graphify-coverage-check.yml.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Commit touches exactly 28 files, all deletions, all under .github/workflows/
- Exactly the 7 kept files remain
- Bilingual EN+FR conventional commit (message text in plan doc)
- Working tree clean after (except untracked noise)

**Verify:** ls -1 .github/workflows | wc -l -> 7; git show --stat HEAD -> 28 files changed, deletions only

**Steps:** git rm 28 files -> pre-commit check (28 staged D lines, ls shows 7) -> write commit msg to .git-commit-msg-tmp.txt via Write tool -> git commit --file= + rm temp -> post-commit verify (stat 28, ls 7, archive 35, status clean). NO push.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/"], "verifyCommand": "ls -1 .github/workflows | wc -l && git show --stat HEAD | tail -3", "acceptanceCriteria": ["exactly 28 deletions in commit", "7 files remain", "bilingual commit message", "no push"]}
```
